about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for premium Korean aesthetic products

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Lumée Maison is the global export brand of SH Core Stetics Global (Skin Global), a specialized B2B supplier of premium Korean medical-grade aesthetic products. We connect aesthetic clinics, dermatologists, and beauty professionals worldwide with the finest products from Korea's leading manufacturers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To make premium Korean aesthetic innovations accessible to professionals worldwide, ensuring authenticity, quality, and reliable supply.
